testcase.name: verify_registration_positive_and_negative

failure.message: Exception during registration test: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[normalize-space()='Register']"}. (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.70, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 15816, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:54427}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.70 (8956564be045..., userDataDir: C:\Users\hp\AppData\Local\T...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:54427/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.70, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 55dcc829a8899e0b2655ef6c2108a517
